title: GTA+
headline: GTA+
subtitle: This Month’s Benefits
content:
In addition to the recurring monthly GTA$500,000 deposited directly into your Maze Bank account, GTA+ Members who've signed up for this month (May 7 - June 10) will also receive:

— The Übermacht Sentinel GTS (Sports)
— 60% off Executive Offices and their Upgrades and Modifications
— The Junk x Jackal Tee and Junk x Jackal Wide Pants
— 2X GTA$ & RP on Import/Export Sell Missions
— And more

Membership automatically renews monthly, cancel anytime. Visit rsg.ms/gtaplus for more info.
